title: Chilita occidentalis
taxonomy: Chilita occidentalis is classified within the family Solanaceae. This family includes a wide range of flowering plants commonly known as the nightshade family. Within the Solanaceae family, Chilita occidentalis is believed to be closely related to other species such as Capsicum and Petunia. The exact classification of Chilita occidentalis is still being researched and refined. Further studies are needed to confirm its exact classification within the Solanaceae family.
uses: Chilita occidentalis is known to have various medicinal uses, including treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant properties.
